source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for crisp creator workflows with Noto Sans guidance for Japanese labels, bright hierarchy, compact controls, and readable dashboard density.
layout: 8px grid, compact panels, feather stripe dividers, thicket-leaf accents, color-coded creator states, and dashboard-first publishing workflows.

prompts.label: Transparent painted bunting motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Painted Bunting transparent motif chroma-key source for a design-system catalog
Primary request: Create only an isolated painted bunting feather-and-thicket motif on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for transparency removal.
Subject: A refined painted bunting motif combining layered bird plumage shapes: vivid ultramarine blue head feathers, emerald green wing panels, scarlet red breast feathers, and small golden yellow accent flashes, with a subtle southern thicket twig curve integrated as a quiet structural accent. Accurate feather texture, crisp silhouette edges, premium joyful creator-system feel.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full colorful feather/plumage emblem without cropping; no environment, no props beyond the tiny twig accent, no text.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light preserving blue, green, red, and yellow bunting colors with tactile feather detail.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff only. One uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation.
Constraints: do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject; no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no landscape, no other birds, no flowers, no watermark, no text, no random brand names.

prompts.label: Light design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 3840x2160 16:9 comprehensive light-mode design-system board for Morphous catalog
Primary request: Create one wide 16:9 light-mode product design-system board for "Morphous Painted Bunting" / "Painted Bunting", based on a southern thicket bird motif with painted bunting colors: ultramarine blue head, emerald green wing, scarlet red breast, and golden yellow accents.
Visual identity: joyful creator system for artists, makers, and publishing tools; crisp product UI, colorful feather-tab accents, thicket leaf dividers, bright but disciplined palette, airy warm white surfaces, dark seed-ink text, creative workspace polish.
Required board sections with large readable labels: palette tokens, typography with English and Japanese guidance, component library, navigation/sidebar, creator dashboard with charts, project table, forms and filters, status badges and alerts, command/search, tabs, switches, checkboxes, spacing/radius/shadow tokens, texture and icon guidance.
UI language: 8px grid, rounded rectangles radius 8px or less, feather stripe dividers, compact creator toolbars, colored swatches, color-coded chart lines, white cards, green secondary panels, red primary call-to-action states, blue focus rings, yellow highlights, dashboard/table/form/status/navigation sections clearly visible.
Text constraints: use clean readable labels only, no random brand names, no watermark, no lorem ipsum, no misspellings; labels should be generic product UI terms such as Studio, Projects, Palette, Publish, Draft, Active, Review, Form, Table, Revenue, Conversion, Upload, Search.
Palette names visible: Bunting Blue #175ad7, Thicket Green #2f8f3a, Scarlet Breast #e43d30, Golden Flash #f4c430, Nest White #fff9ef, Seed Ink #1d2320, Leaf Mist #dceecf, Twig Taupe #8b6f4e, Sky Wash #d9e8ff, Focus Cyan #20b9d6.
Constraints: no bird photo background, no other animals, no generic purple/blue gradient kit, no neon cyber palette, no stock brand logos, no random brand names, no watermark.

prompts.label: Dark design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 3840x2160 16:9 comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for Morphous catalog
Primary request: Create one wide 16:9 dark-mode product design-system board for "Morphous Painted Bunting" / "Painted Bunting", translated from the same southern thicket bird motif and painted bunting colors: ultramarine blue head, emerald green wing, scarlet red breast, and golden yellow accents.
Visual identity: joyful creator system in dark mode for artists, makers, and publishing tools; deep thicket ink backgrounds, luminous bunting blue focus states, green secondary surfaces, scarlet red primary actions, warm golden highlights, subtle twig/leaf neutrals, colorful but disciplined creator workspace polish.
Required board sections with large readable labels: palette tokens, typography with English and Japanese guidance, component library, navigation/sidebar, creator dashboard with charts, project table, forms and filters, status badges and alerts, command/search, tabs, switches, checkboxes, spacing/radius/shadow tokens, texture and icon guidance.
UI language: 8px grid, rounded rectangles radius 8px or less, feather stripe dividers, compact creator toolbars, dark cards, colored swatches, color-coded chart lines, green success panels, red primary call-to-action states, blue focus rings, yellow highlights, dashboard/table/form/status/navigation sections clearly visible.
Text constraints: use clean readable labels only, no random brand names, no watermark, no lorem ipsum, no misspellings; labels should be generic product UI terms such as Studio, Projects, Palette, Publish, Draft, Active, Review, Form, Table, Revenue, Conversion, Upload, Search.
Palette names visible: Thicket Ink #111815, Bunting Blue #4f83ff, Thicket Green #67b85f, Scarlet Breast #ff5a48, Golden Flash #f6cf4f, Nest White #fff9ef, Leaf Shadow #253529, Twig Taupe #a78a63, Night Sky Wash #192a43, Focus Cyan #38cbe6.
Constraints: no bird photo background, no other animals, no generic purple/blue gradient kit, no neon cyber palette, no stock brand logos, no random brand names, no watermark.
